title: Tokusatsu Hero

imagePrompts.prompt: {"type":"Japanese tokusatsu hero design reference sheet","style":"high-end industrial concept art, premium sci-fi character dossier, clean white studio presentation board, realistic CG rendering with sharp mechanical detailing and glossy metallic surfaces","subject":{"franchise":"original fictional tokusatsu hero","character name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"重甲機士 カブライザー\"}","theme":"armored insect-inspired motorcycle hero based on a rhinoceros beetle motif","color scheme":{"primary":"{argument name=\"armor color\" default=\"deep metallic crimson\"}","secondary":"black carbon fiber bodysuit","accent":"cyan glowing lines and lenses","metal":"gunmetal and silver"},"hero design":{"helmet":"sleek armored helmet with a long upward-curving rhinoceros beetle horn, segmented faceplate, bright cyan compound-eye visor, aggressive mechanical jaw area","body armor":"heavy layered chest, shoulder, forearm, thigh, shin, and knee armor with angular paneling, scratches, vents, and glowing cyan seams","undersuit":"matte black textured tactical suit between armor plates","belt":"large transformation belt with circular glowing core device at the center"},"vehicle":{"type":"futuristic superbike","design":"matching crimson armored motorcycle with beetle-horn front fairing, cyan headlights, black mechanical frame, gold front forks, aerodynamic side panels, and aggressive racing silhouette"},"weapon":{"name":"horn blade gun","design":"hybrid blade-and-rifle weapon using the beetle horn motif, rendered in two modes with red armor shell, black grip, metallic mechanical internals, and circular core near the rear"}},"layout":{"orientation":"portrait","page":"single reference/specification sheet with thin gray dividers and black section headers","sections":[{"title":"全身前面","position":"left column upper","count":1,"labels":["full front body"]},{"title":"三面図","position":"upper middle","count":2,"labels":["back view","side view"]},{"title":"変身ベルト","position":"upper right","count":1,"labels":["belt close-up"]},{"title":"変身アイテム","position":"right upper-middle","count":1,"labels":["カブコア"]},{"title":"変身工程","position":"right middle","count":3,"labels":["① ロック展開","② カブコアを装填","③ コア回転・ロック"]},{"title":"ライディングポーズ","position":"middle left and bottom right","count":2,"labels":["rider on motorcycle","rider on motorcycle"]},{"title":"ホーンブレイザー 剣モード","position":"right middle-lower","count":1,"labels":["sword mode"]},{"title":"ホーンブレイザー 銃モード","position":"right lower-middle","count":1,"labels":["gun mode"]},{"title":"weapon transformation steps","position":"beneath gun mode","count":4,"labels":["① ブレード部格納","② グリップ回転","③ 銃身スライド展開","④ ストック展開・ロック"]},{"title":"motorcycle main render","position":"bottom left large","count":1,"labels":["bike side-front view"]},{"title":"motorcycle detail callouts","position":"left of bike render","count":3,"labels":["ホーンカウル","エネルギーライン","武装マウント"]}],"top header":{"main title":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"重甲機士 カブライザー\"}","spec count":5,"spec labels":["身長","体重","パンチ力","キック力","ジャンプ力・ひと跳び","走力"]},"bottom spec bar":{"count":7,"labels":["全長","全幅","全高","車両重量","最高速度","主な機能","bike specs"]}},"text treatment":"all visible typography in Japanese, bold dark red main title, compact black labels in rectangular header tabs, fine gray annotation text, technical brochure aesthetic","composition":"densely packed but orderly reference sheet, large hero figure dominating the left side, technical components and weapon modes stacked on the right, large motorcycle render anchoring the bottom, realistic lighting on a white background","quality":"ultra-detailed, photorealistic CGI, polished concept sheet, magazine-grade mecha presentation"}
